speaker: Argo
text: Huh? Professor Derich?

speaker: Diederich
text: !? H-Hey.

speaker: Argo
text: I don’t usually see you around here. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: R-Really? *sigh*
(? He just hid something behind his back…)

speaker: Diedereich
text: What’re you doing here?

speaker: Argo
text: It’s free time, so I’m just walking around campus.

speaker: Diederich
text: I see...

speaker: Argo
text: (His face seems a bit red…)

speaker: Argo
text: You all right, professor? Are you sick or something? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Huh? No, I’m fine.

speaker: Argo
text: But your face is red.

speaker: Diederich
text: My face always looks like this. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (I don't think so...) *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: What about you? You look a bit worn out. *

speaker: Argo
text: Oh... I'm okay. I’ve just been pulling a lot of all-nighters studying for exams.

speaker: Diedereich
text: You’ll be dead in the water if you get sick when you hafta take ‘em.

speaker: Argo
text: Ugh... You're absolutely right.

speaker: Diederich
text: I know you’re playin’ catch-up here, so it's understandable. But you gotta take care of yourself too. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I will. Thank you for your concern. *paw prints*

speaker: Argo
text: (That’s actually just making me more worried…)

speaker: Argo
text: Professor... Have you been... drinking? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I can smell it...

speaker: Diederich
text: N... No! Why the hell would a professor be drinkin' in the middle of the day!?

speaker: Argo
text: But you are one and that’s what you’re doing… *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: By the way, what did you hide behind your back? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: I’m not hidin' nothin'.

speaker: Argo
text: I saw you do it.

speaker: Diederich
text: You saw nothing!

speaker: Argo
text: Then can I go around you and look? *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: *sigh* "I don't understand why you’re here."

speaker: Diederich
text: "Haaah... Fine. I'll show you." *sigh*

speaker: Professor Derich
text: reluctantly gives in. Sure enough, it’s a bottle of liquor.

speaker: Argo
text: Just as I thought.

speaker: Diederich
text: "I've been waiting for you." *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Please don't tell anyone! I can’t have Celio findin’ out about this! I’m beggin’ you!

speaker: Argo
text: ...If I have to, I owe a lot to you… I’ll just pretend I didn't see anything.

speaker: Diederich
text: Thank you! Men o' the sea really do have big hearts!

speaker: Argo
text: (Part of him must think he can use that whole "men o' the sea" thing to excuse anything…)

speaker: Argo
text: Actually, can you do me a favor? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: What?

speaker: Argo
text: Can you share some of that alcohol with me? 🐾

speaker: Diederich
text: You mean you wanna take it back to your room...? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Yeah. I'm a student so there’s nowhere for me to buy any. *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: Hmm... Well, I was caught drinkin' in broad daylight…

speaker: Diedereich
text: So I don’t think I’d make a very convincin' argument about students not drinkin'! ... *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I’m not trying to make it into some kind of exchange… But we could use a few drinks too, you know. *

speaker: Diederich
text: ……Fine. I’ll share some of my booze with you. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Really!?

speaker: Diederich
text: But don’t get carried away. I won’t hear the end of it from Celio if you cause a ruckus. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Besides, you should be focusin' on your exams. At least wait until after the written portion. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Got it! I'll keep my nose on the grindstone!

speaker: Diedereich
text: Good. Then come pick it up at my office later. I'll wrap it up so no one’ll be able to tell.

speaker: Argo
text: Thank you so much, Professor Derich!

speaker: Argo
text: (Finally. Grant’s going to be so happy……!)

speaker: Argo
text: I have to go now. Try not to let the others see you. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: I—I will… *sigh*
